response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with roughly 14 years of experience, genuine high-scale distributed-systems work at Sociomantic (millions of requests per second, low-latency services), and current hands-on AI tooling experience that matches the AI-first orientation of the role. However, the role is a Principal (IC6) position centered on experimentation, growth measurement, telemetry, and feature-flighting platforms, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience, nor clear evidence of principal-level multi-workstream leadership across teams at enterprise scale. He could be a strong senior/staff generalist hire, but is a domain mismatch for this specific charter.
strengths: 14+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend with strong fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Real production-scale distributed systems experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic/dunnhumby
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and developer-tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), matching the AI-first preferred qualification
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core domain of the role
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives or building platforms adopted across an enterprise organization
Limited signal on data/statistical analysis aptitude and rollout-risk or bias-detection methodology required for experimentation quality work

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and proven high-scale systems work
Gap between senior/staff track record and Principal-level cross-team leadership scope
